title: move_auto command
description: Continue movement in the same direction.

prefixItems.title: move_auto command
prefixItems.description: Continue movement in the same direction.

duration_ms.title: Auto Movement Duration Time in ms
duration_ms.description: Keep moving for specific amount of time (in ms).
duration_ms.markdownDescription: Keep moving for specific amount of time (in ms).

dt_comp.title: Delta-time Compensation
dt_comp.description: Specifies if the movement is compensated by current framerate. Default is True
dt_comp.markdownDescription: Specifies if the movement is compensated by current framerate. Default is `true`

absolute.title: Do not apply velocity on the movement
absolute.description: Specifies if the movement is adjusted using velocity. Default is True
absolute.markdownDescription: Specifies if the movement is adjusted using velocity. Default is `true`
